title: Jordan Thompson (tennis)
extract: Jordan Thompson (born 20 April 1994) is an Australian professional tennis player. He reached career-high rankings of world No. 3 in doubles and of No. 26 in singles. Thompson won the Grand Slam title at the 2024 US Open with Max Purcell. He has won one singles and eight doubles ATP titles. He is currently the No. 8 Australian doubles player.
